script.title: David and Goliath 🗡️ | Bible Story for Kids

scenes.narration: Long ago, a giant warrior named Goliath stood tall on the battlefield. He was taller than a house, and his armor shined in the sun. He shouted at God's people, and everyone was afraid.
scenes.image_prompt: Colorful storybook illustration of a giant warrior Goliath in shining bronze armor standing tall on a grassy battlefield, friendly children's book style, bright warm sunlight, cheerful and family-friendly

scenes.narration: But in a quiet field, a young shepherd boy named David was taking care of his sheep. He was small, but his heart was big with faith in God.
scenes.image_prompt: Colorful storybook illustration of a young shepherd boy David with a staff tending fluffy white sheep in a sunny green meadow, cheerful children's book style, bright blue sky, warm and gentle

scenes.narration: David's father asked him to bring food to his brothers in the army. When David arrived, he heard Goliath shouting. David said, 'I will fight this giant with God's help.'
scenes.image_prompt: Colorful storybook illustration of young boy David carrying bread and cheese, walking into an army camp with tents, his brothers in simple soldier outfits looking surprised, cheerful family-friendly style

scenes.narration: King Saul tried to give David heavy armor and a big sword. But David said, 'I don't need these. God is with me.' He trusted God more than armor.
scenes.image_prompt: Colorful storybook illustration of King Saul offering oversized shiny armor to small David inside a royal tent, David smiling and shaking his head, warm candlelight, children's book style

scenes.narration: David walked to a sparkling stream and picked up five smooth stones. He placed them gently in his shepherd's pouch. His slingshot was ready in his hand.
scenes.image_prompt: Colorful storybook illustration of boy David crouching by a sparkling blue stream, picking up smooth round stones, small leather pouch at his side, cheerful bright sunlight, children's book style

scenes.narration: David stepped into the valley to meet Goliath. The giant laughed and mocked him. But David said, 'You come with a sword, but I come in the name of the Lord.'
scenes.image_prompt: Colorful storybook illustration of small David facing the giant Goliath across a grassy valley, David looking brave and peaceful, giant towering with shield, warm golden sunlight, family-friendly style

scenes.narration: David swung his sling around and let the stone fly. It soared through the air and struck the giant's forehead. Goliath fell down with a mighty thud.
scenes.image_prompt: Colorful storybook illustration of boy David swinging a sling with one stone flying forward, giant Goliath stumbling back, bright sunlight, dynamic but gentle children's book style, family-friendly

scenes.narration: God's people cheered and praised God. David learned that when we trust God, no problem is too big. You are never too small for God to use you in great ways.
scenes.image_prompt: Colorful storybook illustration of cheerful crowd of people celebrating with young David holding his shepherd staff high, bright rainbow sky, joyful children's book style, warm and uplifting
